articles.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer actor Nicholas Brendon dies aged 54
articles.description: Brendon died of "natural causes", his family said in a statement, remembering him as "passionate" and "sensitive".

articles.title: CM  to kick off poll campaign trail from Pathanamthitta
Five booked under atrocities Act in Gurmitkal taluk
articles.description: The FIR says they abused, assaulted Dalits in a temple in Yampad village

articles.title: Meteor breaks apart mid-air over Texas, triggers loud booms | Watch
articles.description: As per the space agency, residents reported seeing the luminous object at around 4:40 p.m. CDT, describing it as a streak racing across the sky. The meteor first became visible at an altitude of roughly 49 miles above Stagecoach, located northwest of Houston.

articles.title: Alert issued against Nipah in Kerala from April to September
articles.description: Previous outbreaks and spillover cases suggest that the virus is found to have been active in the State in the the six-month period starting in April; health officials lay focus on Kozhikode, Malappuram, Palakkad, and Thrissur districts

articles.title: Iran says will hit region’s energy sites if US, Israel target power plants
articles.description: Iran warns of 'irreversibly' destroying vital infrastructure across region after Trump threatens to bomb power plants.

articles.title: Qatari and Turkish citizens die in military helicopter crash
articles.description: Four Qatari military personnel, one Turkish serviceman and two technicians from a Turkish defence company were on board.

articles.title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Manjeswaram set for another photo finish as key players line up
articles.description: The UDF has fielded sitting MLA A.K.M. Ashraf of the Indian Union Muslim League, the NDA is fielding former BJP State president K. Surendran once again and the LDF has fielded  Communist Party of India (Marxist) district secretariat member K.R. Jayanandan

topStories.title: Modi calls ministerial meeting today to review petroleum, power and fertiliser sectors amid US-Iran war — What we know
topStories.description: PM Narendra Modi will hold a ministerial meeting to discuss the energy situation and status of petroleum, power, and fertiliser sectors, amid the US-Iran war in West Asia. Focus will be on logistics and supply stability.

topStories.title: US-Israel, Iran conflict: HMS Anson, Britain's nuclear-powered submarine, arrives in the Arabian Sea, says report
topStories.description: HMS Anson, Britain's nuclear-powered submarine has arrived in the northern Arabian Sea as tensions in the Middle East soar. Equipped with Tomahawk missiles, the Royal Navy submarine left a port from Australia's Perth on 6 March, days after the US and Israel launched strikes against Iran

topStories.title: Iran claims it has shot down ‘invading’ US F-15 fighter jet near Hormuz Island: Watch video
topStories.description: Iran claims to have shot down an enemy F-15 fighter jet near Hormuz Island, with investigations ongoing. The US and other Middle Eastern nations have not commented on the situation, while Iranian media has released a video of the incident.

topStories.title: PM Modi chairs high-level energy meet, reviews power readiness as Trump warns attack over Hormuz Strait
topStories.description: Narendra Modi reviewed key energy sectors as crude prices reached $119 high, tensions in West Asia continued to persist.

topStories.title: 5,000,000,000 kg: The Amount Of CO2 Emitted In 14 Days Of US' War On Iran
topStories.description: About 20,000 buildings have been damaged by US-Israeli strikes in Iran, the Iranian Red Crescent reported. It released an estimated 2.4 million tonnes of CO2 equivalent (tCO2e).

topStories.description: Francia Marquez called for stronger Latin America–Africa ties to boost growth and challenge colonial legacies.

dailyNews.title: Latin American presidents criticise US actions
dailyNews.description: Latin American leaders met at the CELAC Summit in Colombia where President Petro called for a Middle East ceasefire.

dailyNews.title: US-operated Patriot missile likely involved in Bahrain blast on March 9 that injured over 30 people
dailyNews.description: A blast in Bahrain's Mahazza, injuring over 30 civilians, may have resulted from a U.S. Patriot missile intercepting an Iranian drone. Analysis suggests the missile detonated mid-air, causing extensive damage, while Bahrain's defenses failed to prevent the Iranian attack on a nearby oil refinery.

dailyNews.title: ‘The United States doesn’t even pretend to be within international law’
dailyNews.description: ‘The United States doesn't even pretend to be within international law’

dailyNews.title: Iran strikes on US military bases caused $800-mn worth damages in first two weeks of Middle East conflict: Report
dailyNews.description: Iran's military warned of retaliation against US and Israeli energy infrastructure if attacked. Ongoing Middle East conflict has seen Iran targeting US bases, reportedly inflicting $800 million in damages. The US has requested $200 billion for war funding amid rising tensions.

dailyNews.title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: DMK president Stalin offers only five seats, CPI (M) seeks more time to discuss
dailyNews.description: Mr. Shanmugam said, though both parties had been holding talks, a meeting with the Chief Minister had taken place only now. “As he has requested us, we have to respect his words and hold further talks,” he said.

dailyNews.title: Miranda Lambert's childhood home hits market for $1.59M as parents say goodbye to Texas farmhouse
dailyNews.description: Miranda Lambert's childhood home in Lindale, Texas, hits the market for $1.59 million. The country star lived here from age 14-21 during her formative years.

dailyNews.title: JONATHAN TURLEY: Afroman turns court into First Amendment rap lesson on rights
dailyNews.description: Joseph E. Foreman, known as Afroman, used rap songs and security footage to mock Ohio officers who raided his home, then beat their lawsuit in court.

dailyNews.title: The real reasons you’re still exhausted after 8 hours of sleep, according to an expert
dailyNews.description: Still tired after 8 hours of sleep? An expert reveals why quality matters more than quantity, plus tips to improve your rest and wake up refreshed.

dailyNews.title: Ethan Hawke’s advice on unrequited love goes viral, resonates with millions
dailyNews.description: Ethan Hawke's unrequited love advice from the Academy Awards red carpet has gone viral, with fans calling it "insanely beautiful" after his "Blue Moon" Best Actor nomination.

dailyNews.title: Trump says ICE will deploy to airports Monday to assist TSA amid funding standoff
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump will deploy ICE agents to airports across the country on Monday in support of TSA agents amid a funding battle with Democrats.

dailyNews.title: GLP-1 drugs and low-carb diets leave Americans short on fiber as protein craze grows, experts warn
dailyNews.description: Protein products are flooding grocery shelves as influencers promote high-protein diets, but nutrition experts caution the anti-carb trend oversimplifies eating.

dailyNews.title: Leftists are afraid that boys will grow to be men. They think that’s bad
dailyNews.description: New book "Cool Heroes for Boys" challenges the manosphere debate by defining true masculinity as character-based heroism, not political stereotypes.

dailyNews.title: The prospects for "boots on the ground" to seize Iran's enriched uranium
dailyNews.description: As the war with Iran enters its fourth week, much of its stockpile of enriched uranium is believed to lie buried deep inside the Isfahan Mountain complex. CBS News national security correspondent David Martin talks with physicist David Albright, president of the Institute for Science and International Security, about the risks of seizing that near-weapon grade material.

dailyNews.title: Iran warns of "irreversible damage" to region after Trump attack threat
dailyNews.description: President Trump's threat comes after CENTCOM's commander said that Iran's ability to threaten the Strait of Hormuz had been "degraded."

dailyNews.title: Signs of the times: Removing stories of America's past from our national parks
dailyNews.description: Following an executive order from President Trump, the Department of the Interior has removed dozens of educational signs at our national parks that the administration claims promote "divisive narratives" and "corrosive ideology."

dailyNews.title: Poll: Most say Iran war not going well, but don't want regime left in power
dailyNews.description: Most Republicans, especially MAGA, continue to support the US action and express a lot of confidence in Trump personally.

dailyNews.title: Trump says ICE agents will assist TSA at airports as delays worsen
dailyNews.description: Wait times aren't expected to improve until government funding is restored and TSA officers receive paychecks.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens attack on Iran power plants if Strait of Hormuz isn't reopened
dailyNews.description: Iran and Israel traded attacks on Saturday as the war in the Middle East escalated into a dangerous new direction at the start of its fourth week.

dailyNews.title: Analysis: Trump's unshackled presidency puts him at the center of the economy
dailyNews.description: The president's unprecedented use of executive power has made him a driving force behind oil prices, the Federal Reserve's interest rates and more.

dailyNews.title: Trump weighing options for deploying thousands of ground troops in Iran
dailyNews.description: WASHINGTON — President Donald Trump is weighing whether to send possibly thousands of U.S. troops into Iran as he looks for a way to achieve some of his key goals and end the war, according to the two current U.S. officials, two former U.S. officials and another person familiar with the discussions

dailyNews.title: Intelligence chiefs' testimony is out of sync with Trump's talking points
dailyNews.description: For the first time since the U.S. launched a war on Iran, this week top intelligence officials spoke publicly about the conflict.

dailyNews.title: Cuban deputy FM reacts to Trump’s threats to take over Cuba: Full interview
dailyNews.description: In an exclusive interview with Meet the Press, Cuban Deputy Foreign Minister Carlos Fernández de Cossío says “our military is always prepared” but “we don't pose any threat to the United States” after President Trump threatened a U.S. takeover of Cuba.

dailyNews.title: Flyers react to Trump’s plan for federal immigration agents
dailyNews.description: Flyers at Newark Liberty International Airport in Newark, N.J., had mixed reactions to President Donald Trump's plan to send federal immigration agents to airports amid the Department of Homeland Security shutdown. Lawmakers on Capitol Hill have been working through the weekend to fund TSA and alleviate staff squeezes, but a bill has not been passed yet. NBC New York’s Charles Watson reports.

dailyNews.title: Iran refuses to back down after Trump issues 48-hour deadline over Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Tehran has threatened to escalate strikes on energy infrastructure and target critical water desalination facilities, should President Donald Trump make good on a promise to "obliterate" the country's power plants if it does not reopen the Strait of Hormuz
